headline: AppLovin (APP): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
summary: Over the past six months, AppLovin’s shares (currently trading at $515.00) have posted a disappointing 9.2% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 3.1% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
